mapper.select: /* 설 명 : 금주강의조회 */ SELECT MIN(LCTR_WKNO) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_ORDER_MIN , MAX(LCTR_WKNO) AS LESSON_SCHEDULE_ORDER_MAX , MIN(LCTR_WKNO_SYMD) AS LESSON_START_DT_MIN , MAX(LCTR_WKNO_EYMD) AS LESSON_END_DT_MAX FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN LCTR_WKNO_SYMD AND LCTR_WKNO_EYMD AND SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} GROUP BY SBJCT_ID

/* 설 명 : 주차별강의일정목록조회 - with 학습활동포함 */ WITH BULS AS ( SELECT LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, USER_ID, LRN_STSCD FROM TB_LMS_BYWKNO_USER_LRN_STS ), ATND AS ( SELECT A.SBJCT_ID, BULS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, /* 출석 */ SUM( CASE WHEN BULS.LRN_STSCD IN ('CMPTN','LATE','STUDY') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ATND_CNT, /* 지각 */ SUM( CASE WHEN BULS.LRN_STSCD = 'LATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS LATE_CNT, /* 결석 */ SUM( CASE WHEN BULS.LRN_STSCD IN ('ABSNT','NOTSTARTED') OR BULS.LRN_STSCD IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ABSNT_CNT, /* 출석률 */ ROUND( SUM( CASE WHEN BULS.LRN_STSCD IN ('CMPTN','LATE','STUDY') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(A.USER_ID), 0) * 100 , 2) AS ATND_RATE FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A LEFT JOIN BULS ON BULS.USER_ID = A.USER_ID GROUP BY A.SBJCT_ID, BULS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID ) SELECT LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 0 FIRST_ORD, 0 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, 0 SEQNO, '주차TOP' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL' SRC_TBL, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID ID, LWS.LCTR_TTL NM, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SYMD || '000000' SDTTM, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_EYMD || '000000' EDTTM, NVL(A.ATND_RATE, 0) ATND_RATE, NVL(A.ATND_CNT, 0) ATND_CNT, NVL(A.LATE_CNT, 0) LATE_CNT, NVL(A.ABSNT_CNT, 0) ABSNT_CNT, 20 SBMSN, 12 LATE_SBMSN, 2 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS LEFT JOIN ATND A ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND A.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId}
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 1 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, A.LCTR_SEQNO SEQNO, '강의' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_LCTR' SRC_TBL, A.LCTR_ID ID, A.LCTRNM NM , LCTR_SDTTM SDTTM , LCTR_EDTTM EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 20 SBMSN, 12 LATE_SBMSN, 2 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_LCTR A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{sbjctId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 2 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, 0 SEQNO, '과제' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_ASMT' SRC_TBL, A.ASMT_ID ID, A.ASMT_TTL NM , ASMT_SBMSN_SDTTM SDTTM, ASMT_SBMSN_EDTTM EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 20 SBMSN, 12 LATE_SBMSN, 2 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_ASMT A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{sbjctId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE #{sbjctId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 3 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, 0 SEQNO, '토론' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_DSCS' SRC_TBL, A.DSCS_ID ID, A.DSCS_TTL NM , DSCS_SDTTM SDTTM, DSCS_EDTTM EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 0 SBMSN, 0 LATE_SBMSN, 0 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_DSCS A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{sbjctId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE #{sbjctId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 4 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, 0 SEQNO, '설문' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_SRVY' SRC_TBL, A.SRVY_ID ID, A.SRVY_TTL NM , SRVY_SDTTM SDTTM, SRVY_EDTTM EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 0 SBMSN, 0 LATE_SBMSN, 0 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_SRVY A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{sbjctId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE #{sbjctId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 5 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, 0 SEQNO, '세미나' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_SMNR' SRC_TBL, A.SMNR_ID ID, A.SMNRNM NM , SMNR_SDTTM SDTTM, SMNR_EDTTM EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 0 SBMSN, 0 LATE_SBMSN, 0 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_SMNR A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{sbjctId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID WHERE #{sbjctId} = A.SBJCT_ID
UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 6 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, 0 SEQNO, '시험' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC.' || EXAM_TYCD SRC_TBL, A.EXAM_BSC_ID ID, A.EXAM_TTL NM , '' SDTTM, '' EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 0 SBMSN, 0 LATE_SBMSN, 0 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{sbjctId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID AND A.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('EXAM_MID','EXAM_LST') UNION ALL
SELECT A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 6 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, 0 SEQNO, '퀴즈' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC.' || EXAM_TYCD SRC_TBL, A.EXAM_BSC_ID ID, A.EXAM_TTL NM , '' SDTTM, '' EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 0 SBMSN, 0 LATE_SBMSN, 0 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC A JOIN TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS ON A.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID = LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID AND #{sbjctId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID AND A.EXAM_GBNCD IN ('QUIZ','QUIZ_TEAM')
UNION ALL
SELECT 'WKNO001' LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, 1 FIRST_ORD, 7 SCND_ORD, 0 WKNO, 0 WKNO_SEQNO, 0 SEQNO, '자료' ACTV_TYCD , 'TB_LMS_BBS' SRC_TBL, 'DATARM_ID' ID, '자료이름' NM , '' SDTTM, '' EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 0 SBMSN, 0 LATE_SBMSN, 0 NON_SBMSN FROM DUAL A
UNION ALL
SELECT LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID , 2 FIRST_ORD, 7 SCND_ORD, LWS.LCTR_WKNO WKNO, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SEQNO WKNO_SEQNO, 10000 SEQNO , 'LRN_DATA_ADD' ACTV_TYCD, 'TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL' SRC_TBL, LWS.LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID ID , '학습자료추가' NM , LCTR_WKNO_SYMD || '000000' SDTTM, LCTR_WKNO_EYMD || '000000' EDTTM, 10.0 ATND_RATE, 30 ATND_CNT, 3 LATE_CNT, 5 ABSNT_CNT , 0 SBMSN, 0 LATE_SBMSN, 0 NON_SBMSN FROM TB_LMS_LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL LWS WHERE #{sbjctId} = LWS.SBJCT_ID
ORDER BY LCTR_WKNO_SCHDL_ID, FIRST_ORD, SCND_ORD, SEQNO
